gist.headline: Cleaning up the newsroom
gist.blurb: We've reorganized how our social media updates are stored behind the scenes. The diary will keep flowing smoothly, just with a tidier backend.
gist.summary: Refactored the social artifact storage to use canonical summary.json files and updated the website's diary reader to support the new format.
gist.impact: Internal pipelines are cleaner and weekly updates now officially roll out on Sundays.
gist.visual_concept: The bee organizing files or cleaning up a messy newsroom/printing press. Nomnom eating old leaked artifacts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, organizing glowing lime green (#ecf874) folders in a retro filing cabinet. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of old paper documents nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
